reviews.title: Great Value!
reviews.text: Fits my Oral B electric toothbrush. Bristle style is a little different than what I'm used to. But it cleans my teeth just as well as the name brand replacement toothbrush heads. Cant beat the price vs the comparable name brand.

reviews.title: Works fine. Medium soft.
reviews.text:
These are perfectly good replacement toothbrush heads.
They're what I would call a medium-soft bristle, which is about as soft as I like.

Minor points:
Many replacements now come with plastic hoods that snap on to protect the brush from airborne contaminates. These don't.

OEM brushes let you swap the little colored rings on the base, so you can always keep your favorite color. These don't. They have different colors, but they can't be changed.

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text:
Replacement brush heads can be so expensive. That's why I love finding value replacements online.
Nice price for the 4 brush heads. These are good for one person for a year at least.
Brushes are soft so no damaging my gums or teeth.
Works perfect with my oral b.

reviews.title: Fits my electric toothbrush
reviews.text: Just like the original except the price.With the originals price keep going up, this is a very good alternative. shipping was quick.

reviews.title: Fits perfect, soft feeling, strong
reviews.text:
I've been using OralB floss action toothbrush heads for a long time.

While these aren't floss action they clean my teeth nicely.

They fit the OralB toothbrush perfectly, actually felt a little click when I connected it.

The bristles are softer than the brush heads I've been using.

After almost a week of use they seem to be holding up well and feel very strong while using them.

At a little over $2 per head they are a pretty good deal.

title: PerioSciences White Care Oral Care Kit - Toothpaste, Mouthwash, Gel
features: For your oral health -​​ PerioSciences Whitening Oral Care System is a three-product system for daily use by individuals who undergo peroxide-based professional whitening or strips. The product trio can make teeth even brighter, soothe soft tissue, and restore pH balance in the mouth.

Natural ingredients - This dental care kit is made using our signature antioxidants and botanicals such as Phloretin, perilla seed extract, and hesperetin. The whitening toothpaste contains plasdone along with grapefruit seed extracts and micro-minerals to gently polish and thoroughly cleanse surface stains while removing unhealthy build-up.

Dentist recommended - PerioSciences has worked with dentists for over 10 years to perfect our formula containing scientifically proven ingredients that focus on the mouth's natural defense system. Our products are recommended and used by over 1000 dentists nationwide.

Easy to use - Brush teeth with AO ProToothpaste. Rinse with 1 tsp of AO ProRinse for up to 1 minute then spit out. Apply a pea-sized amount of AO ProVantage Gel to gums using a fingertip or cotton swab, let gel dissolve, then spit out. Do not eat or drink for 30 minutes after application.

Redefining Oral Care with Antioxidants - PerioSciences believes in harnessing the power of nature using antioxidants and science in a novel dual approach by using ingredients known to have properties that keep your oral health and your smile at its best.

reviews.title: cleans my teeth well
reviews.text: Love this set, it cleans and freshens my breath.  My teeth feel cleaner longer than with regular toothpaste.  My breath stays fresh all day.  the mouthwash does not burn and the paste is gel like and it does not taste good or bad.

reviews.title: Synergistic formulation
reviews.text:
Excellent at controlling bad breath.
Especially for those of us who have a dry mouth, be it through illness or medications, I can tell you that this product is excellent and that area.
I used it during a time when I also had some mouth irritation. I feel that it helped to heal without any sting.

reviews.title: great set of premium oral care products
reviews.text: It seems like a lot of oral care companies are now going more high end, as I am starting to see toothpaste for over $10 when you can get "normal" toothpaste at the drugstore for $1-$2 (with a coupon). I was drawn to this because it is fluoride free. The toothpaste is nice and minty fresh, my mouth felt clean and fresh afterwards. I know that the brownish colored toothpaste may bother some people but I have used herbal toothpaste before so no color is "weird" or off limits for me - as long as they taste fine. There's even a few brands out there that has black colored paste! I really like the mouthwash as well and I'm surprised it is alcohol free because I feel like it does as good of a job as an alcohol one that I just recently purchased - minus the burn. My mouth just smelled and felt amazing after using both. I wasn't as fond of the dental gel as I found it useless and not something I would want to use much of. Overall this is a very nice set of oral care products and I would highly recommend the toothpaste and the mouth wash. I personally would repurchase the toothpaste and mouthwash - I hope they have a set with just those two items.

features: 【Provides Diamond Cleaning】Bitvae Smart S3 Rechargeable sonic toothbrush features an industry-leading ultrasonic motor that generates 40,000RPM. It provides superior cleaning even in hard-to-reach areas of your mouth. If you are looking for a professional cleaning toothbrush, this is the one!

【Unique Bristle Design to Prevent Tooth Decay】The unique bristle design of the sonic cleaning brush sets it apart from others. Users can get a more thorough dental cleaning experience than with a standard toothbrush. Effectively reduces tartar buildup and helps prevent tooth decay or cavities.

【Personalize Your Brushing】Here are 5 modes & 3 intensities on our sonic toothbrush (9 adjustable intensities on the app) for various gum care needs. This IPX7 waterproof toothbrush has a built-in 2mins timer that pulses every 30secs to remind you to switch to the next quadrant of the mouth.

【Pressure sensor protects teeth and gums】 Brushing too hard can damage tooth enamel, increase sensitivity and lead to gum recession. Our electronic toothbrush with pressure indicator will light up RED to remind you to reduce the pressure to protect your teeth and gums.

【"iSpruz" Smart Oral Care App】This Smart Bluetooth Toothbrush is paired with the app to track and store data on brushing time, coverage, uniformity and excess pressure. You can also change various settings through the app (such as brushing modes, intensities, and brushing time).

【Toothbrush Holder & Travel Case Included】The travel-friendly electric toothbrush includes a travel case that allows users to take the toothbrush anywhere. It also includes a toothbrush/phone holder that helps keep your toothbrush clean at all times. Great all round gift for yourself or your family.

reviews.title: This toothbrush is amazing!
reviews.text: I was surprised by how well this smart electric toothbrush works. The toothbrush connected via Bluetooth to the iSpruz app without any problems. This is a great tool to improve your brushing skills! My teeth feel amazing after each brush. Great affordable toothbrush. Comes with a nice travel case.

reviews.title: Impressive amount of features and app allows customization and guidance for optimal brushing
reviews.text:
I got this to replace an old electric toothbrush, and I'm blown away at how technology has transformed tooth brushing! There are so many customizable features with this toothbrush, and the app will tell you if you're applying too much pressure, missing areas, or not spending enough time brushing.

Here are some of the pleasant surprises:

> Comes with a really nice travel case
> includes a special super soft brush head for gum massage
> The app is AMAZING. It's quick and easy to download and has lots of information and options to adjust the toothbrush operation
> Instruction pamphlet is well written and covers everything you need to know

HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!

reviews.title: Good value for the money, wish it pulsated a little stronger. Terrible app.
reviews.text: For the money this might be the best budget friendly electric toothbrush on Amazon in my opinion. Stay away from the app. It is terribly designed and doesn't consistently sync. The pulses are stronger than others in the same price class, but it isn't quite strong enough to give my mouth a feeling in deep cleaning.

reviews.text: These toothbrushes are designed to clean teeth while simultaneous removing plaque from the gum line. The outer bristles angle out. I found the brush to be effective. The bristles are gentle. I have sensitive gums and they were not irritated or sore after use. Good brush.

reviews.title: Very wide
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. It is quite unusual. It is very, very wide. Make sure you see how much. I don't think I've ever seen one this wide. How it works for you is just going to depend on whether you like that. You can get a lot more at the same time, but some people may find it uncomfortable, especially if you have a small mouth. But it is a way to be very efficient and get a lot of areas. It feels well made. It seems like a quality brush.

reviews.title: Nothing fancy but does the job.
reviews.text: Toothbrushes are necessary and seem to be the one thing that I forget to purchase when I go to the store. So, ordering these Ooak toothbrushes was a no-brainer. These are not fancy. They are traditional toothbrushes that leave your teeth feeling smooth and clean (grit free). There are five rows of soft bristles…the three rows in the center are straight and the outside (colored) ones are slightly angled. The colors of the brushes are neutral, white and orange. The rubber grip handle makes it easy to grip and hold. And finally, on Amazon this two pack is under $7, which is reasonable when compared to other two packs on the market. I’d recommend these.

reviews.title: A unique set of toothbrushes
reviews.text: This toothbrush set has been designed in a V design for the bristles - which means that it looks different than other toothbrushes. The bristles have a lot of space to get in the gum line, in between teeth and works well. I got the medium bristles which are fine with me. I don't want too hard of a bristle, as that is not recommended by the dentist. This does a decent job cleaning.

reviews.title: LOVE THESE BABY TOOTHBRUSHES!
reviews.text: I love everything from this brand. Mushie has the best baby silicone products and I wish I had bought the other products from Amazon so that I can write these reviews! I've been skeptical about using the cotton baby toothbrushes because I don't want any lint staying in my baby's mouth or it slipping off and be a potential choking hazard. This silicone toothbrush fits perfectly on my finger and makes it so much easier to brush his teeth rather than using a toothbrush and worrying about scraping the roof of his mouth. It's soft all around and has a silicone brush side to brush and a bumpy side for better gum stimulation. It comes in a pack of two and this brand has various modern colors. I highly recommend this product for infant brushing!

reviews.title: Great Product, easy to use!
reviews.text: My baby girl loved this toothbrush! It made brushing her teeth so easy and she loved it! She had so much fun brushing her teeth!

reviews.title: A little large but overall good
reviews.text: These are a little large for 0-3 months but overall easy use, clean and very soft.

reviews.title: love these
reviews.text: Real cute, nice that they come in a two pack

title: Brush Buddies 2 Piece Shopkins Toothbrush (2 Packs= 4 Toothbrushes)
description: Ergonomic Design: The brush is designed to give your child a better grip; It has soft, end-rounded bristles that protect the gums and enamel of the teeth; It comes with 4 different Blippi holographic caps Brushing Fun: Adults will appreciate the quality and price point, kids will love the fun details and array of characters including the Shopkins, Garfield, and Kung Fu Panda plus Papa Smurf, Smurfette, Jojo Siwa Electric, Manual, Novelty: Explore oral hygiene products including dental floss, travel toothbrushes, soft and medium toothbrush heads, baby finger toothbrushes, and options for toddlers, kids, and adult Toothbrushes for Kids: Have fun brushing with fun licensed characters; Find the best kids toothbrush heads, electric toothbrushes for kids, kids toothbrush holders, toothbrush covers, and kids toothbrush sets Oral Health: Help clean teeth and freshen bad breath while fighting cavities and plaque with Brush Buddies; Get toothbrush packs, replacement heads, travel sets, denture care, mouthwash, flossers, and more

reviews.title: Perfect size for tiny mouths!
reviews.text:
These are perfect toddler or little kid sized toothbrushes. It’s nice to have 4 of them since kids don’t always use them at the sink. Some how they get into rooms or cars if we are in a hurry right? Also good to have a backup one ready if the toilet is near the sink and it “accidentally” falls in lol. This was part of a birthday present we sent to our niece that turned 5. I like to give something practical, something educational, and something fun!
Every time I purchase something online, I always check the reviews. I count on others to help me choose the best option. My reviews are always my honest opinion and I try to include photos if possible.
If my review has helped you in any way, please click the "helpful" button below so that I know! If you have any questions feel free to ask! Thank you!

title: GO SMILE BLU Foaming Whitening Toothpaste for Blue-Light Toothbrushes, Light Activated Stain Removal & Enamel Whitening Formula to Freshen Breath & Clean Teeth Without Sensitivity, Mint Flavor 2.3 oz
features: Photocatalyst Whitening - Our special formula is a light activated foaming toothpaste that rapidly whitens teeth when paired with GO SMILE BLU blue light toothbrushes. Experience the powerful cleaning of the foaming micro scrubbers while achieving maximum whitening results and stain removal simultaneously.

Advanced Teeth Whitening Formula - Our foaming toothpaste effectively cleans and break up plaque that accrues on teeth, especially after dark liquids like coffee, tea, or red wines. The bubbles penetrate those hard-to-reach places regular toothpaste can't get to.

A Powerful Toothpaste For Professional Results - Remove tough stains and prevent new stains from setting with our specially formula that penetrates teeth for deep whitening and not just surface stains.

Gentle Whitening - Our GO SMILE foaming toothpaste is safe to use on crowns, veneers, and other dental materials. Our toothpaste has been proven to whiten up to 10x better than the leading whitening toothpaste.

Created by a dentist, GO SMILE has been whitening smiles for nearly 20 years. Based in the San Francisco Bay Area, we have revolutionized at-home and on-the-go teeth whitening products that are safe, effective and clinically proven to whiten with no sensitivity. Our products are known for their innovation, ease of use and award-winning results.

reviews.title: Watered down toothpaste
reviews.text: This sucks.  Watered down toothpaste.  A way for you to save product and sale for more. Does nothing for whitening as the product is way too watery.

reviews.title: I Really like It
reviews.text: I bought this to use with my hands-free BLU toothbrush in Dec. This is a refill b/c 1st came with in kit. Love the taste and has whitened my teeth nicely. Took a week to get used to a new Toothpaste, now love it

reviews.title: BLECH!
reviews.text: Although this looks exactly like the whitening foam that came in the kit, this one tastes like SOAP! Like, something you should NOT put in your mouth. I was really disappointed.

reviews.title: Great Item
reviews.text: Great long lasting item.

reviews.title: Instructions aren’t great, but Customer Service was very accommodating.
reviews.text:
This product is better than the expensive one I bought from my dentist. It’s great.
The instructions for use weren’t great, but Customer Service was very accommodating.

title: Collis Curve Toothbrushes - Child's Mixed Dentition-Blue Cap
description: Front label panel: Collis Child's Toothbrush Instructions: Use to brush teeth Ingredients: Clinical tests show the curved bristle to be more effective in massaging gums and removing plaque than the conventional straight bristle. Supplemental Facts: Child's mixed dention bluecap

reviews.title: Make a softer brush
reviews.text: It cleans well, the bristles are not soft. I use it for my son with sensory issues. If they could make a brush with soft bristles, I would buy in bulk!

reviews.title: Fraction of the work of normal toothbrushes!
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are great. I have been using the Mentadent (similar type of brush for adults) brushes on my teeth for years and can't find them anymore. I came across these brushes for my autistic child from a therapist. It allows me to brush their teeth in half the time and more precisely than when I try a regular toothbrush. It also helps them learn to brush their teeth with less frustration while hitting more areas of the teeth. Its a great concept and I am really surprised the regular toothbrush manufacturers aren't making these and putting them in stores everywhere.  The downside is the price- I do wish they were cheaper.

title: Colgate Super Flexi Toothbrush with Tongue Cleaner, Soft - Pack of 3
description: Colgate super-flexi Toothbrush has a tongue cleaner that removes odor causing substances. Its dual cleaning tip effectively cleans at the back and in between teeth while sweeping plaque away. Dental professionals across the world recommend tongue brushing as an important part of your daily oral care regime. Dentists and hygenists recommend replacing your toothbrush every 3 months.
features: Cleaning tip is specially designed to clean hard to reach areas
Polished, end-rounded bristles are designed to effectively clean while protecting enamel and gums
Non-slip rubber grip provides superior comfort and control

reviews.title: Not so soft
reviews.text: These toothbrushes weren't very soft. Other than that I like them. I'll find a use for them.

title: SVITOO Infant Toddler Toothbrush, 2 Pcs Toddler Training Teeth Brushes with Thousands of Soft Bristles, Children Oral Care for Sensitive Gums for 12 Months to 6 Years Babies, Prevent Stuck Throat
features: 【SVITOO Baby/Children Toothbrush】Specially designed for babies and children aged 1-6 years. Food grade materials have passed FDA testing. Creative and lovely toothbrush is a gift for children

【10000 Fine Soft Bristles - Soft Rubber Brush Head】the center of the brush head adopts tens of thousands of bristles, which is very soft and dense. It is our unique design, which can better clean the baby's teeth and mouth. The outer soft silicone brush head has the effect of massaging gums

【Safety baffle】The bear shaped block can attract children, prevent the toothbrush from going too deep into the baby's mouth, prevent the brush head from lying flat on the table and keep it clean. This is creative toothbrush

[easy to hold + suction cup] ergonomic design, suitable for female / male infants over 1 year old. The suction cup can make the toothbrush stand upright on the desktop or adsorb on the wall for convenient placement

【Easy to Clean】Polymer nanomaterials can reduce bacterial reproduction and are easy to clean. You only need to wash with warm water after use. We recommend changing it once a month is better for your baby. Any questions, feel free to contact us.

reviews.title: Soft for gums and tiny teeth.
reviews.text: Cute little tooth brush for babies to learn with. Not going to hurt gums if they start to chew on it. Can see a two year old learning to brush well after tries as a baby with this safe brush.

reviews.title: Love the design
reviews.text: Its so cute and the bristles are soft so its perfect for a toddler.

reviews.title: Great size...
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are the perfect size for toddlers.  The bristles are soft and the handle is made of a combination of hard plastic and silicone, so it’s easy to grip.  The optional silicone guard is perfect for helping little ones learn how to control the brush.  And, each brush has a suction cup on the end of the handle, so it’s easy to stand them up in the bathroom counter.  My only issue is that one of the brushes got smashed during delivery and the silicone guard is bent inwards...it will probably pop out in time, so really only a minor issue.  Overall, nice infant to toddler toothbrushes!

reviews.title: One of my favorite toddler toothbrushes
reviews.text: I really love how theses have the guards. My nephew has special needs so while he's 8, he physically is like an infant. We are teaching him how to hold a toothbrush and brush his own teeth. This is great because he always puts too much in his mouth and ends up choking. If you have a new leader to brushing teeth this is most definitely will be your saving grace.

reviews.title: Great Toothbrush Heads
reviews.text: This is the 3rd time ordering these and it's a great deal! Nice to have a stock of these. These are real Philips Sonicare so they work perfectly in our toothbrush bases. Great price. Great product.

reviews.title: Four Stars
reviews.text: Needed then for the sonicare. price is reasonable. got them when there was not sales tax at that time

reviews.title: Philips Sonicare toothbrush head
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are a very good deal. There are enough in the 6 pack to last over a year because one toothbrush lasts at least 3 mos.

reviews.title: Best Deal for Philips Sonicare Replacement Heads
reviews.text: I doubt you can beat this deal. Always use the Philips Sonicare e Series replacement heads. The knockoffs do not work!

title: TEETHEORY Electric Toothbrush, 8 Brush Heads Sonic Electric Toothbrush with 40000 VPM Deep Clean 5 Modes, Rechargeable Toothbrushes Fast Charge (with Travel Case, Pink and Black)
features: 40000VPM HIGH VIBRATION - 2 pack sonic electric toothbrush equipped with World-leading Powered Motor to generate 40,000 STROKES per minute, and thus dissolve deep tooth dirt effectively. 10X Cleaning Effect than manual toothbrush and 3X than ordinary electric toothbrush. 7 DAYS to Whiten teeth & 14 DAYS for Healthier Teeth.

12 x 3D DUPONT BRUSH HEADS & 2 TRAVEL CASES - 2 pack electric toothbrush comes with 12 brush heads designed by DuPont company; a world leader in quality and material science field. Each brush head lasts up to 3 months, absolutely the ideal choise for all of you! 2 different color hard shell travel cases made of the latest technology materials, can hold 1 brush head. It's very suitable for travel or business trip.

5 MODES & POWER REMINDER - 2 pack sonic electric toothbrush for adult supports 5 modes: whitening, cleaning, sensitive, polishing, massage. Whitening mode fulfilled by reversing the frequency to dissolve the surface stains. And massage modes deliver smooth microbursts to the tissue to improve blood circulation and gum health. Electric toothbrush 2 pack have remaining power knowable after each use. Never worry for sudden power off.

PERFECT PARTNER FOR TRIP - Last for 30 DAYS after only 4 hours full charging(2mins/2 times per day). The 2 pack sonic toothbrush come with a USB charging cable for charging anywhere. Weighs just 55g, less than half of ordinary sonic toothbrushes. IPX7 waterproof for easy water rinsing after each use.

PACKAGE - 2 pack sonic electric toothbrush, 12 DuPont toothbrush heads, 2 travel cases, 2 USB charging cables, 1 User manual. Ideal GIFT CHOICE for family & friends. More than 2 million enthusiastic users around the world feel excellent of using sonic toothbrush to improve gum health and whiten teeth. family is looking forward to your joining!

reviews.title: Good quality product.
reviews.text: Haven't had it long, however, I like the way my teeth feel after brushing.  Light touch buy effective cleaning. I have been a customer of Phillips Sonic for at least 26 years.  At my last dental cleaning, my hygienist also recommends Sonic.

reviews.title: More like the impossible-to-find-Fairywill
reviews.text: This replaces a previously-ordered wireless-charging brush.  Reason for this is that it's lighter, takes a common brushhead (and we have the soft-bristle heads from previously).  Has a plug-in charger, i.e. not wireless, so that works, easy to travel with, don't have to take an induction charger with us. Also, the 30-second indicator is easy to hear/feel.

reviews.title: I like it but room for improvement
reviews.text: It is a great product the reason l gave it a 3 star is l would prefer the brush to spin it just vibrates so l still have to brush and that damages the gums so not happy about that otherwise it holds a battery for at least 3 months or more before the next charge and is a powerful vibration but l will see what my dentist says when l do in on Wednesday after my 6 week check up from having a deep cleaning

title: Brush Buddies Hot Wheels Toothbrush for Kids, Kids Toothbrushes, Toothbrush Pack, Soft Bristle Toothbrushes for Kids, Toddler Toothbrush Ages 2-4, 6PK
description: It’s never too early to introduce a healthy oral care routine— start with Brush Buddies Hot Wheels Toothbrushes! Each pack includes 6 soft bristle toothbrushes with a variety of colors and designs for a fun addition to your little one’s mornings and evenings. Each children’s toothbrush features a small, rounded brush head and textured ergonomic handle for easy grip. The bristles are gentle enough to effectively clean while protecting your child’s sensitive gums and enamel.
features: [What's Included] The Brush Buddies Hot Wheels Manual Toothbrush Pack includes 6 multi-colored Hot Wheels kid's toothbrushes.
[Ultra-Gentle] Each soft bristle toothbrush features a rounded brush head for effective, gentle cleaning while protecting your child's delicate gums and enamel.

[Great for Toddlers] Brush Buddies Hot Wheels Toothbrushes are a great introduction to oral care for your toddlers and young children! The small head size and ergonomic handles are ideal for little ones as they learn to brush their teeth.
[Make Brushing Fun] With bright colors and unique car designs, the children's toothbrushes are sure to make every morning a fun and exciting routine.
[Rotate Regularly] Although dentists recommend a new toothbrush every 90 days, it's important to swap your child's toothbrush after they get sick, too!

reviews.title: No good
reviews.text:
I ordered this for my son, and he loved it so much! He had fun brushing his teeth and did such a good job.
For like 2 weeks.
The battery is not waterproofed, so it is all getting wet every time you brush and rinse. So now it doesn't work. I thought it was just a dead battery, but nope. It all got wet and is ruined.
I'm super disappointed. You would think something like a toothbrush would be better sealed to prevent such a thing from happening. And of course, it died right after the return deadline.
Save yourself the money and drama of explaining to a toddler why he can't use his Blippi brush anymore.

reviews.title: good value
reviews.text: for my grandson he loved them

reviews.title: Works as needed.
reviews.text: You get what you pay for. These kids toothbrushes aren’t expensive and what you receive is good value for the money. Yes, some of the toothbrushes get loosened fibers over time, but we don’t keep them long enough to reach that point. The more aggressive of a brusher you are, the quicker you need to replace them. I find that they don’t last 3 months with good consistent brushing, as the quality declines with usage. Overall I’m happy with these for my son, just remember to switch them out within three months. The design is a great bonus for kids that enjoy HotWheels!

reviews.title: good purchase
reviews.text: good purchase but if you have a toddler who likes to chew on the bristles then you’ll realize the bristles can come out.. so just watch out

reviews.title: Good cheap toddler toothbrushes.
reviews.text: My toddler destroys and flattens bristles. These are cheap enough that It doesn’t break the bank when she needs a new one every few weeks. Bristles also don’t fall out. Will order again.

title: Milos Electric Toothbrush Replacement Heads for Kids, Oral B Compatible Pack of 16, Extra Soft Bristles, Fits for Electric Braun Brush Heads, Refill for Vitality Precision Sensitive and Clean Triumph
features: Compatible - Our toothbrush head set is versatile and compatible with most Braun and Oral B toothbrushes (excluding Oral B Pulsonic and iO).
Professional - Show those pearly whites with confidence! The flexible DuPont bristles on our toothbrush replacement brush heads are designed to remove plaque and promote healthy gums.
Convenient - Each brush on our kid toothbrush head replacement set has a color-coded ring at the bottom to make differentiation easy for the whole family.
Fading Bristles - Take the guesswork out of your hygiene routine. The colored bristles on these toothbrush refills fade to let you know when it's time for a replacement.
Pack Includes - This electric toothbrush head set comes with 16 replacements to make sure you stay on top of your oral health.

reviews.title: I just got it so I can't comment on durability, but...
reviews.text: This is much less expensive than Oral B brush heads. I contacted Oral B to tell them I thought their brush heads are exorbitantly priced, but they blamed it on supply chain issues. So apparently Milos is somehow not affected by supply chain issues. It kinda makes it seem like Oral B's response was B.S. Anyway, these heads I bought fit my Oral B ProHealth toothbrush. It's kind of weird that the bristles aren't all flush with one another, but they seem to work fine. I don't care that the colors don't match with the toothbrush body.

reviews.title: Cheap off brand
reviews.text: You will go through these fast as they seem to wear down super quick. They came fast and were cheap I need them quick as we ran out but I won't order them again.

title: HDP Crystal Soft Toothbrush Floss Color:Crystal Size:Pack of 4 Floss

reviews.title: Great toothbrush!
reviews.text: I was given one by my oral surgeon and have since used nothing else. Used properly gives you a clean like you just left the hygienist.

reviews.title: My dentist recommends!
reviews.text: This is the toothbrush my dentist recommends. I really, really like it! I'm very glad to have found it here so I can change it out as often as she wants me to.

reviews.title: Love these toothbrushes
reviews.text: Have used them for years!

reviews.title: Nothing special, won't buy again
reviews.text:
I could find nothing particularly special about these. They don't clean my teeth better than any other toothbrush thar I have picked up at the grocery store in the past.
Not worth the price. They aren't angled properly to reach the base of my back teeth. Regret getting these vs something like a "Reach" brand that is angled.

reviews.title: Very soft bristles
reviews.text: I always love the Soft toothbrush my dentist gave me.  They changed it so I had to search for different soft toothbrushes for myself.  Found these and it’s definitely very soft bristles.  Highly recommended.  They give you five in package.
